Box.Box:
[bold][color=#39ff14]MISFITS: NUCLEAR WASTELAND — WIKI[/color][/bold]
[color=#c8f0c8]The full Misfits wiki contains faction dossiers, crafting guides, weapons catalogs, survival tips, and the complete server rules.[/color]
[color=#c8f0c8]Click the link below to open the wiki in your browser:[/color]

[color=#1a8a00]PAGES AVAILABLE:[/color]
- [color=#c8f0c8]Server Rules & Directives[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]Faction Dossiers (NCR, Legion, BoS, and more)[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]Faction War System[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]Crafting, Cooking, Botany & Medicine[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]Weapons & Armor[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]Chems & Addiction[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]Currency & Economy[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]Survival Guide[/color]
[color=#1a8a00]— VAULT-TEC NOTICE: A BETTER COMMUNITY THROUGH ORDER. —[/color]
